name: architect-in-the-loop
description: Skills for staying the architect while an agent does the work. You do the thinking; the agent runs in the loop.

skills.name: pair
skills.description: Foundation voice skill. Conclusion first, ruthlessly brief, no AI tells. Every other skill layers on top.

skills.name: plain-english
skills.description: Sticky plain-English reset. Snaps replies back to pair's budget and keeps them there for the rest of the session.

skills.name: teach
skills.description: Learning-mode pacing. One concept per message, anchored to real code, checkpoint before the next.

skills.name: goal-alignment
skills.description: Co-write a PIV brief, resolve all decisions, prove prerequisites, then hand the agent a self-correcting loop.
